nodes.label: High Priestly Prayer: glory, keeping, sanctifying, unity, mission

hinges.identity_□: Father and Son share glory; eternal life is knowing them.
hinges.enactment_◇: Jesus prays: keep, sanctify, send, unite, and bring them to behold glory.
hinges.effect_Δ: Disciples are framed as a protected, consecrated, unified witness to the world.
